Subtotal ₦{{ sub_order.subtotal|floatformat:0 }}
{% if sub_order.status == 'PENDING_VENDOR' %}

Action Required

You have until {{ sub_order.vendor_deadline|date:"M d, Y g:i A" }} to accept or reject. If no action is taken, the order will be auto-cancelled and the buyer refunded.

{% csrf_token %}
{% csrf_token %}
{% elif sub_order.status == 'ACCEPTED' %}

✅ Order Accepted

Coordinate delivery with the buyer using the contact info above. Payment is held securely until the buyer confirms receipt.

{% elif sub_order.status == 'CONFIRMED' %}

💚 Payment Releasing

Buyer confirmed on {{ sub_order.confirmed_at|date:"M d, Y" }}. Payment of ₦{{ sub_order.subtotal|floatformat:0 }} will be available in your wallet within 24 hours.

{% elif sub_order.status == 'REJECTED' %}

❌ Order Rejected

{% if sub_order.rejection_reason %}

Reason: {{ sub_order.rejection_reason }}

{% endif %}

Buyer has been refunded.

{% elif sub_order.status == 'CANCELLED' %}

⏱ Auto-Cancelled

This order was cancelled because no response was given within 48 hours.

{% elif sub_order.status == 'DISPUTED' %}

🚨 Dispute Opened

The buyer has raised a dispute. Our team is reviewing the case. Funds are locked.

{% endif %}
{% endblock %}
